# kSecAttrAccess

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that indicates access control list settings for the item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrAccess: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecAccess] instance that describes the access control settings for this item. Create an access instance by calling the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecAccessCreate(_:_:_:)] method. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/access-control-lists].

Use this attribute to set an access instance when you:

- Create a keychain item, by adding the `kSecAttrAccess` key to the dictionary you pass to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)].
- Modify a keychain item, by adding the `kSecAttrAccess` key to the dictionary you pass as the second parameter to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemUpdate(_:_:)].

You can’t use this attribute to:

- Search for an item by its access instance; for example, by adding `kSecAttrAccess` to the dictionary you pass as the first parameter to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemUpdate(_:_:)]. [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemUpdate(_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] ignore this key when searching for keychain items.
- Get an item’s access instance with [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)]. To get an item’s access instance, call [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainItemCopyAccess(_:_:)].
title: kSecAttrAccess
